description: An alphabetically-indexed staff profile listing table showing name, role, department, email, and optional telephone for each staff member, grouped by first letter of surname.

props.name: groups
props.type: Array<{ letter: string; id: string; members: Array<{ name: string; profileHref: string; role: string; department: string; email: string; telephone?: string; telephoneHref?: string }> }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Staff profile list with multiple alphabetical groups and some members with telephone numbers

stories.name: WithTelephone
stories.description: Staff list showing entries both with and without telephone numbers

members.name: Bolam, Lewis
members.department: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering

members.name: Burnett, Dr Amanda
members.department: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering

members.name: Fieldsend, Rebecca
members.role: Executive Assistant to the Head of School
members.department: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering

members.name: Franklin, Kirsty
members.department: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering

members.name: Harris, Catherine
members.department: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering

members.name: Hammond, Cara
members.department: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering

notes: Root div carries classes: 'tablesaw tablesaw-stack staff-profile-list-block' plus a Drupal js-view-dom-id-* class (ignore the dynamic ID class). The table always has class 'cols-6'. Each row's surname td has both 'views-field-field-stap-surname-2' and 'views-field-field-stap-surname-3' classes — both must be rendered. The surname column is visually hidden (sorted-by column) and shows only the first letter. The AtozList child component renders the alphabetical anchor links at the top. Telephone td is always rendered but is empty when no telephone is available.
